title: mido.yml
description: mido workspace configuration — cross-ecosystem monorepo tool

workspace.description: Workspace name, used in generated package names and CLI output.

packages.description: Package paths relative to workspace root.

bridges.description: Cross-ecosystem dependencies linked by a shared artifact.

artifact.description: Path to the shared file (e.g. openapi.json).

run.description: Fallback shell command when no plugin claims the bridge.

watch.description: Glob patterns to monitor for changes (used by mido dev).

entryFile.description: Server entry file relative to source package dir.

shared.description: Environment variable names that must be present in all env files.

files.description: Paths to env files to check for parity.

format.description: Per-ecosystem formatting. mido picks the right formatter: TypeScript → oxfmt, Dart → dart format.

ignore.description: Glob patterns excluded from formatting across all ecosystems.

typescript.description: TypeScript formatting options (applied via the bundled oxfmt formatter). Any oxfmt/prettier-compatible option is accepted.

tabWidth.description: Number of spaces per indentation level.

useTabs.description: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.

semi.description: Add semicolons at the end of statements.

singleQuote.description: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.

bracketSpacing.description: Spaces between brackets in object literals.

bracketSameLine.description: Put > of multi-line elements on the last line.

arrowParens.description: Parentheses around single arrow function parameter.

proseWrap.description: How to wrap prose in markdown.

singleAttributePerLine.description: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML/JSX.

importOrderTypeScriptVersion.description: TypeScript version for import order parsing.

dart.description: Dart formatting options (applied via dart format).

lint.description: Per-ecosystem linting. mido picks the right linter: TypeScript → oxlint, Dart → dart analyze. Plugins auto-enabled based on dependencies.

ignore.description: Glob patterns excluded from linting across all ecosystems.

typescript.description: TypeScript linting (oxlint). mido auto-enables plugins: typescript, unicorn, oxc, import; react/jsx-a11y if React detected.

categories.description: Rule categories group 700+ rules by intent. Each category can be "off", "warn", or "error".

correctness.description: Code that is outright wrong or useless.

suspicious.description: Code that is most likely wrong.

perf.description: Code that could be more performant.

rules.description: Individual rule overrides. Keys are rule names (e.g. "eslint/eqeqeq", "import/no-cycle"), values are severity or [severity, ...options]. See https://oxc.rs/docs/guide/usage/linter/rules.html

dart.description: Dart linting (dart analyze). Respects analysis_options.yaml in each package.

commits.description: Conventional commit validation, enforced by mido's commit-msg git hook. Run `mido install` to set up hooks.

types.description: Allowed commit types. Defaults to conventional commit types; add custom types as needed.

scopes.description: Allowed commit scopes. Empty array allows any scope.

header_max_length.description: Maximum length of the commit header line.

body_max_line_length.description: Maximum line length in commit body.
